goal: Ask-a-Question cards still smaller than Daily — expand to match; slow Celtic deal ~1s
done: (1) QUESTION CARD SIZE: measured both boards in a real browser same viewport — Daily card 61x106 but Question only 34px. Root cause: question board is a flex item with auto side-margins, so width:auto SHRINK-WRAPPED it to its cards (4 collapsed 34px cols = 156px board) instead of filling to 320px, so the daily card clamp never applied. Fix: definite width: min(320px, 100%) (base + <=640 rule) → 4x1fr cols ~75px → cards 61x106, matching Daily (boardW 320). Verified real browser. (2) CELTIC SPEED: animateFullDeal too fast — slowed ~1s (stagger 14->30, flight 300->500, opacity 240->300); total ~1.0s -> ~1.88s. Cache-bust 20260623b -> 20260623c; www synced.
fix: question board definite width min(320px,100%) stops shrink-wrap → cards match Daily 61px; animateFullDeal slowed ~1s.
